title: vaccinium jagorii
intro: Vaccinium jagorii, also known as the Japanese blueberry or bilberry, is a species of shrub in the heath family (Ericaceae). The Vaccinium jagorii plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting eye health. Vaccinium jagorii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often consumed fresh or dried to reap its nutritional benefits.
